title: Valkyrien_Skies-defense
description: This mod has added many decorative blocks, which usually have extremely high explosion-proof coefficients. The currently added decorative blocks include 12 colors of steel casings, steel blocks, and tempered glass.
body:
### **Project Highlights**  
**Perfect Fusion of Industrial Aesthetics and Ultimate Protection**  
This mod adds a series of **decorative blocks** to Minecraft that combine **high explosion resistance** with **modern industrial design**, tailored for technical modpacks and builders aiming to create an indestructible tech empire!  

---

### **New Features**  
✅ **12-Color Industrial Steel Casings**  
- Offers **12 color schemes** from matte black to neon blue, perfect for tech/cyberpunk-themed builds.  
- **Base explosion resistance: 200** (immune to TNT, Creeper explosions, and Ender Crystals).  
- Supports Redstone wiring integration for seamless hidden circuitry.  

✅ **Reinforced Steel Framing**  
- Modular steel block textures for constructing pipelines, machinery shells, and industrial structures.  
- Explosion resistance: **150**, compatible with pistons and slime block mechanics.  

✅ **Tempered Safety Glass**  
- 95% light transmittance with an explosion resistance of **80**.  
- Resists direct attacks from Withers and Ender Dragons, ideal for hazardous zones.  

---

### **Application Scenarios**  
🛡️ **High-Risk Industrial Protection**：Encapsulate nuclear reactors to prevent chain explosions.  
🏗️ **Cyberpunk Metropolis**：Pair with shaders to craft neon-glowing futuristic factories.  
🔧 **Redstone Machinery Camouflage**：Hide circuits while maintaining functional automation.  

---

### **Design Philosophy**  
> *"Defense should never compromise aesthetics."*  
Every block undergoes **256 explosion tests** to ensure it withstands both End raid farms and mischievous greifers!  

---

**[Download Now]** to fortify your world!
